ORDER - STIPULATION AND ORDER BY ALL PARTIES TO A JURY TRIAL

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. SANTIONS DENIED. AS FOR THE MOTION AGAINST LONNY RAY TYRONE, GRANTED AS TO FORM INTERROGATORY NO. 6.4 AND 8.4. DENIED AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NOS. 4, 13, 14, AND 22; FORM INTERROGATORY NO. 8.6 SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO BE SERVED WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Req.'S. And For Monetary Sanctions Against Tyrone Construction And Statement Of Questions
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests And For Monetary Sanctions Against Tyrone Construction And Statement Of Questions is granted in part and denied in part.
Santions Denied. As for the motion against Tyrone Construction, granted as to Special Interrogatory Nos. 37, 38, 39, and 40. Denied as to Special Interrogatory Nos. 2, 5, 6, and 11. Supplemental responses to be served within 15 days of notice of entry of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Req.'S And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests And For Monetary Sanctions is granted in part and denied in part. Santions Denied. As for the motion against Lonny Ray Tyrone, granted as to Form Interrogatory No. 6.4 and 8.4. Denied as to Special Interrogatory Nos. 4, 13, 14, and 22; Form Interrogatory No. 8.6 Supplemental responses to be served within 15 days of notice of entry of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
